name: verso-notebook
description: Interactive .NET notebooks with C#, F#, PowerShell, Python, SQL, IntelliSense, database connectivity, and EF Core scaffolding

verso.hostPath.description: Path to the Verso.Host.dll. If empty, uses bundled host.

verso.extensionsPath.description: Directory of third-party Verso extension assemblies to load on notebook open. Changes apply on next notebook open or kernel restart.

chatParticipants.name: verso
chatParticipants.description: Create, edit, run, and explore Verso notebook cells

commands.name: cells
commands.description: List all cells in the active notebook

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run all cells in the active notebook

languageModelTools.name: verso_listCells
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all cells in the active Verso notebook, showing each cell's source code, language, and outputs.

languageModelTools.name: verso_addCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a new cell to the Verso notebook. The 'type' field determines the cell kind. For code cells, also set 'language' to the kernel. For non-code types (markdown, html, mermaid, etc.), only type is needed. Refer to the system prompt for available cell types and languages.

language.description: The kernel language for code cells. Not needed for non-code cell types. Refer to the system prompt for available languages.

source.description: The source code or content for the cell

type.description: The cell type. Use 'code' for executable code cells (requires language). Other types vary by notebook. Refer to the system prompt for available types.

position.description: 1-based position to insert the cell at. If omitted, the cell is added at the end.

languageModelTools.name: verso_updateCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update the source code of an existing cell. Use the 1-based cell number (call verso_listCells first to find it).

source.description: The new source code for the cell

languageModelTools.name: verso_removeCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a cell from the notebook by its 1-based cell number.

languageModelTools.name: verso_runCell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a specific cell by its 1-based cell number and return the output.

languageModelTools.name: verso_runAll
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute all cells in the notebook sequentially and return results.

languageModelTools.name: verso_listVariables
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all variables currently in scope in the notebook kernel, showing name, type, and value preview.

languageModelTools.name: verso_inspectVariable
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the detailed value of a specific variable by name.

languageModelTools.name: verso_getLanguages
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List the available languages/kernels for the active notebook.

languageModelTools.name: verso_listParameters
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all parameters defined in the notebook. Parameters are named, typed values (string, int, float, bool, date, datetime) that can be set before execution to control notebook behavior.

languageModelTools.name: verso_addParameter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a new parameter to the notebook. Supported types: string, int, float, bool, date (yyyy-MM-dd), datetime (ISO 8601). A parameters cell is automatically created if one does not exist.

type.description: The parameter type: string, int, float, bool, date, or datetime

description.description: A human-readable description of the parameter

defaultValue.description: The default value as a string (parsed according to the type)

languageModelTools.name: verso_updateParameter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update an existing parameter's properties. Only the fields you provide will be changed. Use verso_listParameters first to see current parameters.

name.description: The name of the parameter to update

type.description: New type: string, int, float, bool, date, or datetime

defaultValue.description: New default value as a string (parsed according to the type)

languageModelTools.name: verso_removeParameter
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a parameter from the notebook by name. This also removes the corresponding variable from the kernel.

name.description: The name of the parameter to remove

languageModelTools.name: verso_getCellProperties
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the configurable properties for a specific cell. Properties are extension-provided settings like visibility, formatting, or tags. Call this before verso_updateCellProperty to discover available properties and their current values. The response includes providerExtensionId values needed for updates.

cellNumber.description: 1-based cell number to get properties for

languageModelTools.name: verso_updateCellProperty
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update a property on a cell. Call verso_getCellProperties first to discover the available properties, their field types, and the providerExtensionId needed for this call. For Select fields, use the option value (not display name). For Toggle fields, use 'true' or 'false'.

providerExtensionId.description: The provider extension ID from verso_getCellProperties results

value.description: The new value as a string. For Toggle: 'true'/'false'. For Select: use the option value. For Tags: comma-separated values.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:host && npm run build:wasm && npm run build
